# REGIME READ — 2026-06-29

## Changes Since Previous Read
- **Stage: 4 → 4 (HELD, conflicted Day 4).** Stage 4 confirms by breadth (Nasdaq Comp through −7%) but **disconfirms by vol** (VIX back to 18.31, well below 20 floor). The Jun 26 "VIX confirms into Stage-4 band" thesis has been REVERSED within one session — vol divergence reasserts. **Day 4 of Stage 4 = quarter-end-eve = the regime is now BIFURCATING: breadth says Stage-5-by-trigger, vol says Stage-3-flirt.**
- **Total score: −4 → −3 (delta +1, marginally less bearish).** Sentiment recovers −1 → 0 on VIX vol-crush back below 20 (the Jun 26 confirmation cleared in one session). Macro upgrades −2 → −1 on 10Y yield easing 8bp to 4.372 (−6.7% from 52W high vs −5.0% prev) + DXY held flat. **Breadth downgrades −1 → −2** on Nasdaq Comp through −7% (TRIGGER FIRED). Dealer-flow held −2 (VXN unchanged at 30.82). Cross-asset held 0 (gold bid faded −0.70%, brent fresh lows). Geopolitical +2 held.
- **Triggers from previous read:**
  - **Bearish — VIX daily close above 22:** **CLEARED / REVERSED** (18.31, 3.69 pts away — was 1.91 pts Jun 26; gap WIDENED 1.78 pts overnight as VIX crushed back below 20 floor).
  - **Bearish — VXN through 34 (52W high):** **NOT FIRED** (30.82, 3.18 pts away — essentially unchanged).
  - **Bearish — Nasdaq Comp close at −7% from 52W high:** **FIRED at exactly −7.0%.** The single closest bearish trigger from Jun 26 read (0.3 pts away) executed in one session. NDX −1.09% Friday close = mega-cap finally gave way; Nasdaq Composite breaks the breadth floor.
  - **Bearish — TQQQ below 200DMA $68.09:** **NOT FIRED but ARMED CLOSER** (est. ~$72.15 post-Jun-26 -3.27% NDX-derived; +6.0% above, was +9.5% Jun 25).
  - **Bearish — HY OAS through 300 bp:** **NOT REFRESHED** (credit data gap persists into Week 2).
  - **Bullish — TQQQ daily close above 50DMA $76.39 for 2+ sessions:** **NOT FIRED, MOVED AWAY** (est. ~$72.15, −5.5% below — was −2.4% Jun 25; gap WIDENED 3.1 pts after Jun 26 mega-cap drop).
  - **Bullish — VXN sub-28:** **NOT FIRED, STILL DRIFTING WRONG WAY** (30.82, 2.82 pts away).
  - **Bullish — VIX below 18 for 2+ sessions:** **NOT FIRED but CLOSING FAST** (18.31, 0.31 pts above — was 2.09 pts above Jun 26). Single session of vol-crush continuation = trigger.
- **Notable lens flips:** **Breadth −1 → −2** (Nasdaq Comp through −7% trigger), **Sentiment −1 → 0** (VIX out of Stage-4 band), **Macro −2 → −1** (yield + dollar relief). Direction net: dealer-flow held bearish but other-lens shifts produced marginally less bearish total. **The defining Jun 26→29 signal: VIX vol-crush back below 20 within ONE session of Jun 26 confirmation is the structural non-confirmation re-asserting AT THE WORST POSSIBLE TIME (Nasdaq Comp breadth trigger fired same window). The market is sending split signal: positioning unwind says relief, breadth says Stage 5.**

> **Snapshot mix:** Equity indices + VXN + 10Y = Jun 26 Friday close (post-PCE cash close, end-of-week). VIX + DXY + Brent + Gold = Jun 29 Monday intraday (today). **Today is Monday Jun 29 = Day-Of-Week-pre-quarter-end (Jun 30 tomorrow), 5 trading days from NFP Jul 3.**
>
> **Headline shift #1 — Nasdaq Comp −7% breadth trigger FIRED.** From −6.7% Jun 25 to **exactly −7.0% Jun 26 close**. NDX −1.09% Friday session = mega-cap conceded the bid that held through Jun 25. The defining bearish trigger from the Jun 25/26 reads has executed. **Breadth is now in Stage-5 trigger zone.**
>
> **Headline shift #2 — VIX vol-crush back below 20.** VIX 20.09 Jun 26 → **18.31 Jun 29 intraday** (drop of 1.78 pts in one trading-day gap). The Jun 26 "VIX confirms Stage-4 band" thesis has been reversed within ONE session. **VIX/VXN spread widens back to 12.51 pts (was 10.82 Jun 26, 13.4 Jun 23) — the bearish-way compression Jun 26 was a one-day spike, not sustained.** Bullish-bias "VIX below 18 for 2+ sessions" trigger is back to 0.31 pts away — one Monday session below 18 = trigger ARMED for Tue close.
>
> **Headline shift #3 — Cross-asset cluster shifts UNDISTRESSED.** Gold $4,050.10 (−0.70%) — flight-to-safety bid from Jun 26 FADES Day 1. Brent $73.02 (+1.43% — but from very low base, fresh 52W lows still; modest bid likely supply-news). DXY 101.26 (−0.10%) held flat. 10Y 4.372 (−8 bp from Jun 25) = bond bid extends. **Cluster is now: bonds bid (deflationary/recession leaning), gold fade (de-risking complete or stress was sector-specific after all), oil low (growth concern persists). Mixed but the gold fade is the most important Jun 29 signal — it reverses the Jun 26 generalization-of-fear narrative.**
>
> **Headline shift #4 — NDX −1.09% Friday but VIX dropped −0.54% Monday morning.** This is the DIVERGENCE OF THE WEEK: mega-cap finally broke, but vol didn't follow through. Dealers either (a) accept Nasdaq breadth break as routine quarter-end positioning OR (b) view the Jun 26 vol spike as fully overshoot. Either way, premium did NOT extend on Friday's NDX break = positioning is genuinely lighter than Jun 26 vol spike suggested.
>
> **DJI/RUT 5 sessions of relative bid running (Jun 22, 23, 24, 26, 29-est):** DJI −0.09%, RUT +0.07% Jun 26 = quarter-end defensive rotation continuing. Confirms Day 5 of pre-rebalance positioning.

## Regime Stage Tracker
- **Current Stage: 4 — Regime-change (HELD; CONFLICTED Day 4).** Stage 4 thesis: VIX 20-30 rising, breadth deteriorating. **Breadth is unambiguous bearish** (Nasdaq Comp through −7% trigger, NDX worsens to −5.3%); **vol is unambiguous bullish-reversal** (VIX back to 18.31, gap to 22 trigger widened, gap to sub-18 bullish trigger closes to 0.31 pts). Pure Stage-5 entry requires VIX>20 sustained — NOT met. Pure Stage-3 reclaim requires multi-condition bullish trifecta — also NOT met. **This is Stage 4 in its most ambiguous form: breadth-trigger-fired + vol-non-confirmation Day 4.**
- **Stage Anchor:** Jun 23, 2026 — VXN through 30 + Nasdaq Comp −5% trigger. **Day 4 of Stage 4. Quarter-end rebalance Jun 30 tomorrow = Day 5 = the binding event-day.**
- **Position:** Stage 4 Day 4 pre-quarter-end. Path-loaded with Jun 30 quarter-end (tomorrow) + ISM Jul 1 (Wed) + NFP Jul 3 (Fri) cluster. **Bifurcated signal: breadth says Stage-5-by-trigger, vol says transitional/range-bound.** Conservative scoring keeps Stage 4 because VIX>20-sustained criterion is the dominant Stage 5 marker per the framework definition.
- **Confidence: Medium.** Downgraded from Medium-High Jun 26. Why downgrade: (a) breadth and vol now disagree decisively — the Jun 26 alignment broke; (b) PCE-day full digestion is unclear — Jun 29 vol crush could be either "relief priced in" OR "complacency before quarter-end rebalance"; (c) quarter-end Jun 30 is binding event-day tomorrow with rebalancing direction unclear in current divergent setup; (d) gold flight-to-safety bid fading Day 1 = cross-asset fear NOT generalizing. Medium (not Low) because: (1) Nasdaq Comp −7% trigger is a hard signal; (2) Geopolitical lens (+2) remains single-point-of-failure offset; (3) VXN held above 30 = Nasdaq dealers still hedging.
- **Bullish trigger (→ Stage 3 reclaim):** VIX daily close below 18 for 2+ sessions (currently 18.31, 0.31 pts away — **ARMED for Tue Jun 30 close**) AND VXN close below 28 (currently 30.82, 2.82 pts away) AND TQQQ daily close above 50DMA $76.39 for 2+ sessions (currently ~$72.15 est., −5.5% below — gap widened from Jun 25's −2.4%) AND Nasdaq Comp climbs back inside −5% from 52W high (currently −7.0%, 2.0% rally needed). **Multi-condition; only VIX trigger is proximate. Other three need durable follow-through inconsistent with Stage 4 hardening on breadth-side.**
- **Bearish trigger (→ Stage 5):** **Breadth already FIRED** (Nasdaq Comp at exactly −7.0%). Confirmation conditions for FULL Stage-5 transition: VIX daily close above 22 sustained (currently 18.31, 3.69 pts away — gap widened) OR VXN through 34 (52W high, 3.18 pts away) OR TQQQ close below 200DMA $68.09 / 4-wk low $68.08 (concurrent, ~−5.7% from spot) OR HY OAS through 300 bp OR MOU walk-back / fresh shock OR hot NFP Jul 3 in Stage-4 regime.

## Regime Verdict
US risk environment **holds Stage 4 in CONFLICTED Day 4 — breadth-trigger fired (Nasdaq Comp through −7%) but vol non-confirms (VIX back to 18.31, sub-18 bullish trigger ARMED) — heading into quarter-end Jun 30 with cluster events Jul 1 + Jul 3 ahead.** Total score worsens to neutral-ish −3 on offsetting lens shifts. Medium confidence — split signal at the worst possible time.

## Diverging Signals
- **THE DOMINANT JUN 29 DIVERGENCE: Nasdaq Comp -7% trigger fired BUT VIX crushed back below 20 within ONE session.** This is the textbook "vol non-confirmation of breadth break" — historically this configuration resolves 50/50: either (a) vol catches up violently within 5 sessions (most common in Q-end regimes where positioning unwind is mistaken for relief) OR (b) breadth mean-reverts to vol within 5-10 sessions (less common when concentration is breaking down). The Mar 2007 / Aug 2015 / Feb 2018 precedents tilt slightly toward (a) — vol catches up — when breadth break is concentration-driven (current setup).
- **VIX/VXN spread widens BACK out to 12.51 pts.** Was 13.4 (Jun 23 spike) → 12.11 (Jun 24 calm) → 10.82 (Jun 26 confirmation) → **12.51 (Jun 29 vol crush, divergence reasserts)**. The Jun 26 bearish-way compression was a one-day spike, not sustained. **Spread direction now flat-to-widening = the Nasdaq-stress vs broad-calm bifurcation REASSERTS.** Read: institutional positioning sees concentration risk in mega-cap but doesn't see broad market stress. This is dangerous because if it resolves bearish, the catch-up move in VIX is violent.
- **NDX −1.09% Friday + VIX dropped same window = mega-cap break NOT triggering broad hedging.** Either (a) dealers see the NDX move as quarter-end-rotation-driven and not regime stress OR (b) the VIX print was a stale carry from the Jun 26 Friday close to Monday Jun 29 intraday (yfinance data convention question). In either case, the operational signal is: broad hedging demand DID NOT extend after Friday NDX break. **Premium-rich-on-Nasdaq, premium-cheaper-on-broad is now visible structurally.**
- **Gold flight-to-safety bid FADES Day 1 (-0.70% Jun 29).** Jun 26 read flagged gold +0.76% as the cluster-shift signal. Jun 29 fade reverses that. Combined with VIX crush and brent's modest bid off lows, the Jun 29 cluster signal is "Jun 26 was overshoot, conditions partially normalizing." **But Nasdaq Comp -7% breadth trigger fired in the same window — so the "normalization" reading is incomplete at best.**
- **DJI/RUT 5 sessions of relative bid (Jun 22, 23, 24, 26, 29-est).** Quarter-end defensive rotation unambiguous. The Jun 30 close-auction will see continuation of this pattern at outsized volume. **Direction is now telegraphed for 5+ sessions = the rotation flow may be exhausting before the actual rebalancing day Jun 30. Bullish reversal risk in DJI/RUT on Tue close if positioning is fully pre-positioned.**
- **Geopolitical lens +2 is the only meaningful offset to −5 net bearish primary lens cluster.** Total +2 on geopolitical absorbs −5 on breadth + dealer-flow + macro. Single-point-of-failure exposure intensifies as breadth trigger fires. MOU 10 sessions old; historical stress-test window 10-21 days post-signing is now active.
- **TQQQ structural floor $68.09/$68.08 is now 5.7% from estimated spot $72.15** (was 8.7% Jun 25). Concentrated risk: any single-day TQQQ move >5.5% breaks both 200DMA AND 4-wk low concurrently. EM 5-day lower bound $63.1 (est.) sits 7% below structural floor = adverse one-sigma path = structural break with margin.

## TQQQ Read
- **Momentum:** RSI estimated ~40-43 — lower-neutral band, broke below 46-50 Jun 26 on the −3.27% session estimate. Not oversold (>30) yet but tilting that direction. Mean-reversion tailwind weak but present in this band; oversold-bounce risk for any short-vol structure increases when RSI breaches 35.
- **Market structure:** **SIDEWAYS holds but DOWNTURN threshold now 2.3% below spot** (was 5.5% Jun 26 estimate). Est. −18.1% from 4-wk high $88.09 (deteriorated from −15.3% Jun 25); +6.0% above 4-wk low $68.08 (cushion narrowed from +9.6% Jun 25). DOWNTURN threshold $70.47 = 2.3% below spot — **a single −2.4% TQQQ session = DOWNTURN switch**. **Critical proximity: DOWNTURN is now within ONE Jun-26-magnitude session.** EM lower bound $62.8 = 8.3% below structural floor = adverse one-sigma path triggers DOWNTURN AND structural break + 7%.
- **Trend:** **Price estimated decisively BELOW 50DMA $76.39 (−5.5%, was −2.4% Jun 25).** Gap to 50DMA widened by 3.1 pts on Jun 26's −3.27% TQQQ session. The Jun 25 "reclaim within striking distance" narrative has been reversed. 200DMA cushion narrowed to +6.0% (was +9.5% Jun 25). **200DMA + 4-wk low convergence at $68.08/$68.09 is now 5.6% below spot — the most concentrated structural floor on the chart and the closest it has been since Stage-4 entry.**
- **Volatility & premium environment:** **VXN 30.82 (essentially flat at −0.29%) — held in Stage-4 vol band, NOT crushing despite the broad VIX crush.** Est. TQQQ IV held ~92.5%. EM ~±13.0%. **The premium-rich-on-Nasdaq, premium-cheaper-on-broad bifurcation is unambiguous: dealers are NOT releasing Nasdaq hedges even as broad VIX crushed below 20.** This is meaningfully more informative than absolute VXN level: **the absence of VXN crush in lockstep with VIX = dealers genuinely view Nasdaq concentration risk as unresolved.** Premium remains rich for a reason. Reading: dealers price Jun 30 quarter-end + Jul 3 NFP + residual Stage-4 risk into Nasdaq vol but NOT broad vol.
- **Put-selling context: HOSTILE (held Day 4 with conflicted conviction).** Held HOSTILE on: (a) **Regime Stage 4 with breadth trigger FIRED** — Nasdaq Comp −7.0% means breadth-side has executed Stage-5 trigger; (b) **TQQQ 5.5% below 50DMA, structural floor 5.6% below** — both proximate bearish anchors; (c) **DOWNTURN threshold 2.3% below spot** — single Jun-26-magnitude session = market structure shifts to DOWNTURN regime; (d) **VXN held above 30 unchanged** — Nasdaq dealers NOT releasing premium despite VIX crush; (e) **Quarter-end Jun 30 TOMORROW** — outsized close-auction with defensive rotation already telegraphed for 5 sessions; (f) **ISM Jul 1 + NFP Jul 3 cluster** — three event-days in 5 sessions; (g) **Geopolitical lens +2 is single-point-of-failure** support; (h) **Cross-asset gold bid fading Day 1** — fear normalization could be incomplete; (i) **VIX vol-crush BELOW 20 = divergence** — historically resolves with vol catching up to breadth in concentration-driven setups within 5-10 sessions; (j) **EM lower bound $62.8 = structural-break-plus-7%** territory on adverse one-sigma. Tactical complication: VIX sub-18 bullish trigger ARMED for Tue Jun 30 close (0.31 pts away) — if it fires alongside quarter-end positioning, the read shifts from HOSTILE-firmly to HOSTILE-with-tactical-relief-possibility. **Net: HOSTILE — breadth trigger fired, vol divergence at worst time, structural floor concentrated and proximate, dense event cluster ahead. Context only — no strikes, sizes, expiries, or trade calls.**

## Forward Levels & Triggers
- **Bullish trigger (→ Stage 3 reclaim, multi-condition, near-term: VIX leg ARMED only):** VIX daily close below 18 for 2+ sessions (currently 18.31, **0.31 pts away — ARMED for Tue Jun 30 close**; one Monday-like vol drift = Tue trigger fires) AND VXN close below 28 (currently 30.82, 2.82 pts away — would need ~10% VXN crush) AND TQQQ daily close above 50DMA $76.39 for 2+ sessions (currently ~$72.15 est., −5.5% below — needs +6.6% TQQQ recovery) AND Nasdaq Comp climbs back inside −5% from 52W high (currently −7.0%, needs 2.2% rally). **Only VIX leg proximate; other three require structural Stage 4 reversal that quarter-end + NFP cluster does NOT favor.**
- **Bearish trigger (→ Stage 5 confirmation, BREADTH ALREADY FIRED):** Nasdaq Comp at −7.0% **FIRED**. Confirmation conditions for FULL Stage-5 transition: VIX daily close above 22 sustained (currently 18.31, 3.69 pts away — gap widened) OR VXN through 34 (52W high, 3.18 pts away) OR TQQQ daily close below 200DMA $68.09 / 4-wk low $68.08 (concurrent break ~−5.6% from spot — within Jun-26-magnitude reach in 2-3 sessions on adverse path) OR DOWNTURN threshold $70.47 breach (−2.3% from spot — single session) OR hot NFP Jul 3 OR MOU walk-back / fresh shock.
- **Neutralizer:** Two sequential cool prints (Quarter-end Jun 30 orderly + NFP Jul 3 cool) + VIX sustained below 18 for 2+ sessions (ARMED for Tue) + VXN crush below 28 + TQQQ 50DMA reclaim for 2+ sessions. **Without all conditions, Stage 4 persists in conflicted form. Conversely:** Stage-5 confirmation can fire on TQQQ structural floor break (5.6% away — within Jun-26-magnitude reach) OR hot NFP OR DOWNTURN switch (2.3% away — single session reach).

## This Period's Catalysts
- **Jun 29, 2026 (Mon, today):** Pre-quarter-end positioning. No scheduled binding event.
- **Jun 30, 2026 (Tue):** **Quarter-end rebalance** — outsized close-auction; defensive rotation pre-telegraphed for 5 sessions. **TOMORROW.** **Most critical near-term event.**
- **Jul 1, 2026 (Wed):** **ISM Manufacturing PMI June reading** — first-of-month data, typical 0.5-1% NDX reaction band.
- **Jul 3, 2026 (Fri):** **NFP June payrolls (pre-July-4 close)** — 4 trading days out. Next binding macro event.
